what_it_does: Fabless semiconductor — 60GHz mmWave beamforming chips for wireless, industrial and defence. Formerly MoSys Inc.
catalyst: Military contract: 60GHz chip selected by InTACT (Israeli defence) for drone IFF (Identification Friend or Foe) system. No dollar value disclosed. Defence + drone narrative driving retail FOMO.
verdict_note: Day-trade scalp only. Tight stop below Friday close. DO NOT hold into March 16 earnings.
sentiment: Retail FOMO driven by defence/drone narrative. Real catalyst but serial diluter with 1:40 reverse split history. Already +151% — chasing risk is high.
